prompt: Refine this Aevum+ hexagon emblem logo (reference image), keeping the same hexagon badge and San Marino blue (~#4D6E9E) + silver-grey + near-black navy palette on white. BIG CHANGE: make the 'A+' the bold, unmistakable HERO of the mark — a strong, clean, geometric capital 'A' with a clearly visible '+' (plus) right beside its upper right, both large and immediately readable as 'A+'. Weave a slim DNA double-helix subtly into the A (as its center stem or one leg) so it reads as science, but the A+ stays dominant and crisp. ICON ONLY, no other text/wordmark. Premium clinical biotech, crisp vector, centered on white.

Iterate on this Aevum+ hexagon emblem (reference), same palette San Marino blue (~#4D6E9E) + silver-grey + near-black navy on white. Make a bold prominent 'A+' the clear focal point inside the hexagon: a solid confident capital 'A' with a distinct '+' integrated at its top-right, large and legible. A DNA double-helix forms the A's central vertical, neatly. The A+ must POP and be obvious. ICON ONLY, no wordmark, no other letters. Sleek premium biotech, crisp vector, centered on white.

Redesign this Aevum+ emblem (reference) cleaner and bolder, same San Marino blue (~#4D6E9E) + silver-grey + near-black navy on white. Hero is a big, modern, very visible 'A+' — strong geometric A with a clear plus sign; a minimal DNA helix accent twists behind or through the A as a subtle science cue without hiding the A+. Keep a soft hexagon container OR drop it, whichever reads cleaner. ICON ONLY, no wordmark. Premium, minimal, crisp vector, centered on white.

Another refinement of this Aevum+ mark (reference), same palette San Marino blue (~#4D6E9E) + silver-grey + near-black navy on white. Make the 'A+' large and dominant and crystal clear: a bold capital A with a prominent '+' to its upper right, sitting in/over a clean hexagon. Premium clinical biotech, crisp vector, centered on white.
